title: No-Go For Starship Today, Next Try Maybe Next Week
summary: SpaceX postponed its first Starship Flight 13 launch attempt after an issue during engine startup.

title: SpaceX aborts Starship Flight 13 launch attempt
summary: SpaceX aborted the latest Starship test flight when some engines did not ignite.

title: NASA Welcomes Serbia as Newest Artemis Accords Signatory
summary: Serbia joined the Artemis Accords during a ceremony at NASA Headquarters in Washington.

title: Russia Agrees to ISS Operations, Seat-Swaps, Through 2030
summary: Russia and NASA agreed to support International Space Station operations through 2030.

title: SpaceX launches 21 satellites for military data network
summary: The Space Development Agency has placed half of its planned Tranche 1 Transport Layer constellation in orbit.

title: Nature study identifies a new way to spot nuclear weapons in orbit
summary: A Nature Astronomy study proposes a satellite design to detect thermonuclear warheads in space.

title: NASA Study Finds Near-Earth Asteroid Is Actually Comet
summary: NASA research identifies a puzzling near-Earth object as a comet through precise motion tracking.
